<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>量<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">liánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tán</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>度<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dù</rt></ruby>（<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>零<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">línɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>掌<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǎnɡ</rt></ruby>）。<ruby>底<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>座<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>宽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuān</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>围<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>掌<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǎnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>座<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>底<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>座<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>层<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">磴<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>宽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuān</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>。<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">磴<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dà</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">磴<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>宽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuān</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tán</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>。<ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Gònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>拐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>角<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>角<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiǎo</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>供<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Gònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>宽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuān</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>方<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fānɡ</rt></ruby>；

<ruby class="CharOverride-1">磴<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>宽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuān</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>方<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fānɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Sì</rt></ruby><ruby>围<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>半<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bàn</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>底<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>座<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>围<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>宽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuān</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>肘<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǒu</rt></ruby>。<ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tái</rt></ruby><ruby>阶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>朝<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cháo</rt></ruby><ruby>东<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Rén</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：<ruby>建<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tán</rt></ruby>，<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>其<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qí</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>献<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">燔<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>洒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xuè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby><ruby>典<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">diǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>章<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">niú</rt></ruby><ruby>犊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dú</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>赎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shú</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Lì</rt></ruby><ruby>未<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Sā</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>裔<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>近<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>侍<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>取<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>些<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiē</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">niú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xuè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>抹<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>角<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">磴<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>台<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>拐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>角<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiǎo</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>围<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tán</rt></ruby>，<ruby>坛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tán</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>赎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shú</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>牛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">niú</rt></ruby><ruby>犊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dú</rt></ruby><ruby>烧<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shāo</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>殿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">diàn</rt></ruby><ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wài</rt></ruby>、<ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wài</rt></ruby><ruby>预<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>定<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>之<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chù</rt></ruby>。
